findings.message: User-supplied input reaches database without required transformation. The post_item() endpoint passes payload.name directly to create_item(), bypassing create_item_normalized(). The repository layer explicitly documents that user input MUST go through normalization (strip + lowercase), but this endpoint violates that contract, allowing untransformed data to persist.
findings.suggestion: Change line 45 from 'return create_item(session, payload.name)' to 'return create_item_normalized(session, payload.name)' to ensure user input is normalized before storage. Remove or correct the misleading docstring that describes intentionally skipping normalization.
